channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Nvidia’s direct-to-chip liquid cooling is a sustainability and a performance win
item.description: “We have eliminated massive amounts of power usage and pretty much all water usage” – Nvidia Rubin to use 45°C direct-to-chip cooling.

item.title: You won’t have long to get these iPad deals before Apple’s price hike
item.description: Apple just raised prices across its iPad and MacBook lineup. The good news is that many retailers are still selling their inventory at the old prices or far less, which means you can still score some of the best iPad deals we may see in awhile — if ever again. So if you’ve been thinking […]

item.title: Test du Mova V70 Ultra : Enfin un robot aspirateur laveur qui nettoie les moindres recoins
item.description: Après un V50 Ultra Complete déjà très convaincant, Mova, la marque spin-off de Dreame, revient à la charge avec le V70 Ultra Complete, son nouveau fleuron premium. Au programme : une puissance d'aspiration stratosphérique, une serpillière extensible inédite, une station cyclonique sans sac et lavage à 100 °C. Tient-on ici le nouveau roi du nettoyage des sols ? Voici notre avis après plusieurs jours de test intensif. ...

item.title: Nothing Phone (4b) given a thumbs-down by fans, who say they'd '100% buy' the concept phone the company will never make
item.description: Nothing recently showed off two phones, but you'll only be able to buy one of them, and it's not the one people want.

item.title: 'They come in with an energy and excitement, a new view on things': AWS CEO Matt Garman explains why Amazon is hiring 11,000 new interns and junior staff when others are getting rid
item.description: Amazon might've fired 16,000 workers earlier this year, but it's bringing in 11,000 new workers for fresh talent.

item.title: I tested the Leica SL3-P, and it's a masterclass in restrained design
item.description: The Leica SL3-P is built for photographers who'd rather be invisible than impressive, and it largely delivers on that promise.

item.title: Amazon's Prime Day 4K Blu-ray sale is heaven if you want movies in Dolby Atmos and HDR to really show off what your home theater can do — I've picked 20 of the best, all under $15 / £17
item.description: Give your home theater system a workout in Dolby Atmos and 4K HDR.

item.title: Polestar has been muscled out of the US market
item.description: Polestar won't be allowed to sell its electric vehicles model year 2027 and beyond in the US after the federal government denied the company's request for authorization under a new rule banning vehicles with software from China. In a press release, the company says the decision to retreat from the US follows a recent decision […]

item.title: 'We're going to look back at this day as the moment we shifted safety into the next gear': Samsara's new 360 camera and AI tools look to make work sites safer and smarter for all
item.description: Samsara's new 360 Camera and AI Multicam look to improve safety and visibility for work teams everywhere.

item.title: Xbox prices are rising again after Microsoft helped drive up component costs
item.description: We're all trying to find the guy who did this.

item.title: A Fatal Tesla Crash in Texas Sets Up a Legal Showdown
item.description: Did Full Self-Driving (Supervised), Tesla’s driver assistance feature, play a role in a woman’s death?

item.title: a16z-backed Base Power is offering cheaper electricity to the power grid that needs it most
item.description: Base Power is skipping the PJM's troubled interconnection queue by placing its batteries at people's homes, offering backup services in exchange.

item.title: The iPad Air is my favorite Apple tablet, but it just got more expensive — this Prime Day deal may be your last chance to grab it for less, and it’s already selling out
item.description: Apple has officially raised the price of the iPad Air, meaning Amazon's Prime Day deals on that very product are more popular than ever.

item.title: The best robot vacuum I've tested just saw a hit a record-low price for Prime Day, but these 3 budget-friendly expert-approved alternatives might be better deals
item.description: Dreame's X50 Ultra Complete robot vacuum is among the best of the best, so don't miss this huge Prime Day saving.

item.title: Here’s a bunch of Prime Day deals on keyboards, mice, and other peripherals we like
item.description: RAMageddon has come for computers. The price of memory chips, hard drives, and solid state storage has skyrocketed. That’s led to price increases on desktop and laptop RAM, SSDs, spinning hard drives, and pretty much everything that uses any of those things. Consoles are more expensive. Desktops are more expensive. Laptops are more expensive. Tablets […]...

item.title: Still looking for a big screen for the World Cup? I'm a TV expert and these are the best 75-inch TV Prime Day deals I could find
item.description: The World Cup still has a long way to go, so if you're looking for a big screen upgrade, these are the best Prime Day TV deals to consider.

item.title: On the hunt for a new Bluetooth speaker to fill the background of summer parties? These are the 7 best JBL Prime Day offers right now, including one on our all-time favorite model
item.description: Bluetooth speakers are a summer party must, and JBL is the brand I'm eyeing up this Prime Day.

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude is winning over paid consumers, a market owned by ChatGPT
item.description: Despite ChatGPT's commanding market lead, consumers who pay for AI have been increasingly choosing Anthropic's Claude, data shows.

item.title: The Long Walk is coming to HBO Max — and you'll be pleased to know it's a short wait
item.description: The Long Walk is streaming in early July, and it's definitely one to watch.

item.title: Sony announces major layoffs at Bungie, including most of the Destiny team
item.description: Some devs working on Marathon have also been laid off and studio head Justin Truman has stepped down.

item.title: China's answer to Claude's Fable 5 comes top of the HTML web design contest as the CEO tells Elon Musk GLM will reach Mythos-class before Q1 2027
item.description: GLM-5.2 tops web leaderboard using strong templates, library integration, and pricing advantage over Claude Fable 5

item.title: You’ve got 11 hours to save 67% on this 4TB SanDisk Creator SSD, now just $350 down from $1050
item.description: Save 67% off this 4TB Sandisk Creator SSD, now $350 down from $1050 but hurry up this anti Prime Day offer ends in 11 hours.

item.title: FCC ID mandate plans could kill anonymous burner phones
item.description: The FCC's proposed changes to Know Your Consumer rules are generating alarm among privacy experts.

item.title: Russia allegedly used a forensics platform to hack an activist's phone, despite having its access cut off
item.description: Cellebrite claims the hardware predates current sanctions and was used without its consent.

item.title: Chinese cybersecurity company 360 unveils “China's version of Mythos”, and Yitianzhen, to automate cyber defense
item.description: China "cannot afford to wait", the company says, as Mythos finds more and more flaws.

item.title: Valve clarifies that all Steam Machines have a single 16GB RAM stick — here's what this means, and why I think it's another reason gamers may hold off buying the PC
item.description: A previous statement from Valve indicating that the Steam Machine was a 'RAM lottery' in terms of memory configuration was, in fact, mistaken.

item.title: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
item.description: Amazon’s Prime Day is now in its third day, and whether you’re looking for a new pair of wireless earbuds or a smartwatch, there’s a good chance you’ll find a discount. The Apple Watch Series 11 has already dropped to a new low price, while the AirPods Pro 3 are discounted to $179. With Apple […]

item.title: 54 Prime Day steals under $25 you won’t want to miss
item.description: We at The Verge love a good gadget or tchotchke, especially when it’s not too expensive. But with the rising cost of just about everything these days, many once-cheap gadgets aren’t so affordable anymore. Amazon and other retailers sell all sorts of products from word salad brand names, but only some of it is handy […]

item.title: Microsoft augmente le prix des Xbox pour la troisième fois en un an
item.description: Microsoft relève une nouvelle fois le prix de ses Xbox Series X et S, cette fois dans le monde entier à partir du 1er août 2026. La France est donc concernée, même si Microsoft n'a pas encore détaillé les nouveaux tarifs en euros.

item.title: How to watch Curacao vs Ivory Coast: Free Streams & TV Channels online from anywhere for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Curacao vs Ivory Coast for free online and from anywhere as Group E reaches its conclusion at the FIFA World Cup 2026.

item.title: How to watch Ecuador vs Germany: Free Streams, TV Details and Kick-Off time for FIFA World Cup 2026 as La Tri aim to avoid early exit
item.description: Here's how to watch Ecuador vs Germany for free online and from anywhere in Group E of the FIFA World Cup 2026, as La Tri face a win-or-bust encounter.

item.title: OpenAI's updated GPT-5.5 Instant is better at shopping, complex constraints, and understanding user intent — and it's already in the API
item.description: OpenAI has made a significant update to its most widely used language model, GPT-5.5 Instant, which is the default in the free version of ChatGPT. The company announced the upgraded version of GPT-5.5 Instant yesterday on X, calling it "much more fun to talk to" and saying it is "better at understanding the intent behind a question and adapting its response accordingly," as well as offering improvements in shopping results, local recommendations, and handling "complex constraints."However, it has not yet provided any benchmarks or numerical results to quantify these claims. The company said th...

item.title: 12 Anker Prime Day deals for your desk — My home office runs on Anker gear and here's what I recommend in Amazon's big summer sale
item.description: This is the Anker gear I recommend grabbing in Amazon's summer sale.

item.title: Prime Day deals under $50 that are really worth it
item.description: If you’re looking for a good deal without spending hundreds, Prime Day discounts have pushed some of our favorite products under $50. You can pick up everything from Nintendo Switch games to Bluetooth speakers while sticking to your budget. We’ll keep this post updated throughout the sale as we find new deals and low prices, […]

item.title: Squirt is bringing back its face-to-face video chat feature
item.description: Tired of scrolling past the exact same faces? Squirt just added a grid to track new users, along with a revamped face-to-face video chat.

item.title: How to watch Ecuador vs. Germany online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Ecuador vs. Germany in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to watch Curacao vs. Ivory Coast online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Curacao vs. Ivory Coast in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy A27 lands with several key upgrades over the A26 — but one core feature has surprisingly gotten worse
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy A27 has launched with a new chipset, upgraded selfie camera, and a more modern design, but at least two downgrades.

item.title: I test coffee makers for a living, and these are the top 3 cheap espresso machines I recommend — particularly on Prime Day
item.description: Great quality coffee makers don't have to cost a fortune — these three all have my personal seal of approval, and won't burn a hole in your pocket.

item.title: Xbox console prices are about to rise for the second time in a year, just before GTA VI launches — so you really don't want to miss this Xbox Series X deal at Walmart while it lasts
item.description: Rising by at least $100 and up to $150, depending on the version

item.title: Over 100 fresh tech deals from Prime Day day 3
item.description: It’s day three of Prime Day, folks. We’re nearly 75 percent of the way through Amazon’s four-day sales event, and unsurprisingly, many deals are still sticking around. There have been all kinds of discounts on things like TVs, smart home gadgets, chargers, headphones, and more. Prime Day typically isn’t as big of a deal as […]

item.title: General Intuition’s $2.3B bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world
item.description: General Intuition has raised $320 million to scale AI trained on millions of hours of gameplay, betting action data can help AI develop something closer to human intuition.

item.title: The Aerogarden I Recommend to Everyone Is Just $83 Right Now, a 63 Percent Discount
item.description: This flash deal is a rare chance to buy one of our favorite hydroponic gardens for less than $100.

item.title: Prime Day 2026 live: Were vetting the latest Amazon deals in real-time
item.description: Get live updates on the first Prime Day of 2026. We found record-low prices on Samsung TVs, DJI drones, Kindles, Sony headphones, and more.

item.title: Xbox prices spike another $100 or more
item.description: Microsoft is increasing the prices of Xbox consoles again. Starting August 1st, 512GB models will be $100 more expensive, while 1TB models will be $150 more expensive. This means that the Xbox Series S will start at $499.99, the Xbox Series X without a disc drive will start at $749.99, and the Series X with […]

item.title: Databricks’ former AI chief thinks he can cut AI’s power bill by 1,000x
item.description: Un-0 is an image-generation system tool that shows for the first time how the company's technology can replicate conventional AI systems.

item.title: Don't waste your money on over-priced noise cancelling headphones — I've tested more than 15 models, and these are the only 4 I'd buy right now
item.description: Enter into your own little world with these top-class noise cancelling headphones.

item.title: New X-VPN's soccer servers are designed to do one thing — get you to a World Cup stream faster
item.description: X-VPN has launched a dedicated Soccer 2026 server line across six countries, built around match-season streaming. Here is what it offers and why it lands at the right moment.

item.title: Hacked Klue says criminals are deleting stolen customer data, but now other hackers are making threats
item.description: Market research company Klue told customers that it believes the hacking group that stole their data is now deleting it. The company, however, warned about a second group of hackers wanting ransom.

item.title: If this heatwave has taught me anything, it's the value of keeping your drinks cool — which is why I'm snapping up this Yeti Prime Day deal in preparation for next summer
item.description: Hydration is important: save on Yeti Rambler mugs with these Prime Day deals on all sizes, and stay quenched in summer for years to come.

item.title: The Apple Watch Series 11 is $120 off for Prime Day, its all-time low price
item.description: We’ve seen a lot of great Prime Day deals on wearables this year, from the Fitbit Charge 6 to the latest Apple Watch SE. But if you’re looking for advanced health features, the Apple Watch Series 11 is the one to check out, and it’s now down to its best price ever: $279 ($120 off) […]

item.title: The Samsung S26 Ultra is already marked down to $920 for Prime Day
item.description: Amazon has the 256GB Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra on sale for $919.99 (usually $1,099.99) for Prime Day, a significant discount for a phone that released just a few months ago in March. The S26 Ultra has a set of four rear cameras for excellent photos, a refined design that’s comfortable to use, and a built-in […]

item.title: Amazon brought back the Black Friday $10 Fire TV Stick deal for Prime Day
item.description: The Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Select is back down to $9.99 for select customers on Prime Day. That's the best streaming stick deal by far.

item.title: Pour trouver un smartphone à 120 Hz et endurant à moins de 150 euros, cela se passe chez Xiaomi avec cette réduction sur le nouveau Poco C81 Pro
item.description: Le Xiaomi Poco C81 Pro est un récent smartphone conçu pour ceux qui cherchent un produit polyvalent sans trouer leur portefeuille. Preuve en est, il chute actuellement à 125,90 euros au lieu de 203 euros à l'occasion des soldes d'été.

item.title: Pokémon Legends Z-A is is easily the best Pokémon game in years — and right now it’s $25 off for Prime Day
item.description: Struggling with Pokémon Champions? This Nintendo Switch 2 Prime Day deal could genuinely help you win more games.

item.title: Samsung's latest budget phone has mild upgrades and a $50 price hike
item.description: The Galaxy A27 5G has a stronger chipset, at least.

item.title: Designers imagine the impact of Brexit, 10 years on
item.description: The exhibition, titled ‘The Other Side: Ten Years after the Referendum,’ is currently on view at Pentagram’s Osh Gallery in London. The video begins with a faceless performer wearing a mask of former British prime minister David Cameron. Standing in front of a crinkled white sheet, the performer begins to slowly feed pages of a book into a paper shredder, letting the machine’s whir serve as the video’s only sound. The process continues for five minutes, and the mask changes five times, from Cameron to Theresa May and Boris Johnson. By the end of the part-comical, part-unsettling performance, t...

item.title: Oppo Reno 16 : la nouvelle gamme de smartphones arrive en France avec un dos « magique », mais les prix s’envolent
item.description: Oppo officialise le lancement en France de sa série Reno16, composée des Reno16, Pro, F et FS. Au programme : surcouche ColorOS 16 truffée d'IA, grosse batterie et design HoloVerse 3D, mais l'addition devient salée.

item.title: MacBooks and iPads just got more expensive. Lock in Prime Day Apple deals before its too late.
item.description: The best Prime Day Apple deals include record lows on the Apple Watch Series 11. It's also your last chance to buy MacBooks before a price increase.

item.title: Halo Campaign Evolved's three new missions were inspired by Troy Denning's Halo books, but Halo Studios would recommend playing them after finishing the original story — 'It is meant to be played that way'
item.description: Halo Campaign Evolved executive's three new missions were created with the help of Halo book author Troy Denning.

item.title: Got to get you into my life: these essential vinyl albums and gifts will help you come together on Global Beatles Day — all you need is love (and maybe a great beginner turntable too)
item.description: Perfect gifts for the Beatles fan in your life — even (especially) if it's you

item.title: I’ve spent Prime Day hunting for glorious retro gaming gadgets — whether you want to play nostalgic Nintendo games on your Switch 2 or are after a classic console, these are my personal highlights
item.description: I’m a massive retro gaming nerd so I’m always looking out for fantastic retro gaming gadgets — here are a handful of the best I’ve spotted this Prime Day.

item.title: Apple price increases arrive: How much MacBooks and iPads will cost you now
item.description: The ongoing global memory shortage has taken another very prominent victim: Apple.

item.title: Last chance: Get the MacBook Neo for $589 at Amazon before prices go up for good
item.description: Apple is raising prices on the MacBook Neo. This budget laptop is still available at Amazon for $589.99 for a little while longer.

item.title: We found 15+ Prime Day deals on MicroSD and portable SSDs: How to beat RAMageddon
item.description: With RAMageddon, memory prices are going way up. Shop rare Prime Day deals on portable SSDs, HDDs, and microSDs from Samsung, SanDisk, and Lexar.
